channel.title: Posts on tpongo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on tpongo

item.title: Rant about job applications in academia: requirements, websites, gender criterion
item.description: In this post I just wanted to vent/rant quickly about my postdoc job search/application experiences in academia. In the end I ended up going into more details on a gender “discrimination” example I encountered.

item.title: How does flex memory mode compare to dual-channel mode?
item.description:
Recently, I bought a used Lenovo Thinkpad T14 Gen3 laptop with 24 GB RAM in it. 24 GB is an unusual amount of memory to have because it is not a power of two. I assumed that there is an 8 GB soldered and a 16 GB replaceable memory stick in the laptop. I didn’t think much of it at the time of buying, I was just happy to have more RAM (in the end 24 > 16).

However when I already had the machine for a few weeks, I wondered, would it be better to have just 16 GB of RAM but have it run in dual-channel mode?

item.title: Moving back to Hungary from China
item.description: It’s been a long time since I haven’t posted here, so I will make a short update here. I moved back to Europe, Hungary this month, so I want to write about some of the reverse culture shocks I experienced, the things that were new to me, OpenStreetMap and my planning of the Camino de Santiago.

item.title: One month of Youtube
item.description: As a first post I thought to share my Youtube watching experiences from last month. To be honest I think 80% of it is thrash looking at it in retrospect, but there are definitely some that I find invaluable. I will mostly cover Youtube videos from content creaters that I follow, not just randomly clicked on from my feed.
